name: Sera Voss
rank: Senior Acquisitions Agent (field rank — reports directly to Serrik Dhal)
sd_appearance: A tall, slender figure with pointed ears and iron-grey hair, Sera Voss moves through the dimly-lit Undercity streets. She wears a deep burgundy and gunmetal coat with too many pockets, the Iron Fang Consortium mark subtle on the lapel. A hidden blade peeks from under her fine coat, a crossbow slung casually over her shoulder. Her left hand, missing two fingers, rests on the hilt of the blade, a stark reminder of her mysterious past.
faction_visual: deep burgundy and gunmetal coat, Iron Fang mark subtle on lapel, always armed
style_note: mercantile-military — expensive but practical, always armed, never obviously so
